short_definition: The implementation-facing contract for the Narada Agent Runtime Server.
description: The NARS Runtime Contract defines package authority, launch boundary, protocol shape, carrier adapter boundary, client/runtime split, and verification expectations for the Narada Agent Runtime Server. It is the operational contract below launcher planning and above provider-specific carrier execution.
boundaries: Not a browser or terminal shell.

authority.notes: The contract is documented and realized through agent-runtime-server, carrier-runtime, and client projections.

confidence.basis: The runtime contract is documented as the operational contract for NARS and is backed by runtime and client tests.
